cases.insight: High-share format: language + identity + humor in the first seconds.
cases.brandFit: Adaptable for travel apps, food brands, language tools and lifestyle products.

cases.hook: A simple Friday morning in Sicily.
cases.insight: Nothing dramatic — just a real moment people want to be in. Creates a calm, “wish I was there” feeling.
cases.brandFit: Travel, lifestyle, wellness, and fashion brands that fit into real routines.

cases.hook: Parking here makes no sense — but it works.

cases.hook: Things I stopped doing after moving to Sicily.

header.title: Pitch Emails
header.lead: Fill in your creator profile, brand, audience, style and metrics. The subject and email body update from your information, then you can generate a sharper version with AI.

card.linkPlaceholder: Portfolio, media kit, link in bio or WhatsApp
card.audiencePlaceholder: e.g. Gen Z travellers, new expats, food lovers
card.contentStylePlaceholder: e.g. funny Reels, honest reviews, aesthetic B-roll
card.signaturePlaceholder: Add your name, handle, portfolio link, location or WhatsApp

tips.title: ✦ Sending Tips
items: Find the Marketing Manager or Brand Partnerships name on LinkedIn before sending — greatly increases response rate
Send to direct emails (name@company.com), not the generic contact@company.com
Add 2–3 metric screenshots or a link to this portfolio
Follow up in 5–7 days if no reply — most conversions come on the second contact
Start with small and medium brands — easier to close and builds your UGC portfolio
Offer a first gifted video for smaller brands — makes it easier to start and test the partnership

templates.tag: 💳 Fintech / Expat Services — Wise, Revolut, N26
templates.subject: Subject: UGC x [Brand] | [Creator Niche] Creator | [Key Metric]

segments.content: , and my audience actively saves, shares and uses tools that make money, travel or life abroad easier.

Your product fits naturally into the kind of content my audience already watches: practical tools, money decisions, travel planning, relocation, international payments, budgeting or everyday problem-solving.

→ 1 x Reel/TikTok with a native hook + natural product integration
→ 1 x Story sequence with link or CTA
→ Raw files included for your brand to repurpose

1. "3 money mistakes I wish I avoided sooner" — [Product] as the practical solution
2. "The app/tool that makes [audience problem] easier" — authentic list format
3. "Before vs after using [Brand]" — problem/solution Reel built for saves

Happy to share my rate card and discuss. Would love to explore this together!

templates.tag: ✈️ Travel / Accommodation — Booking, Airbnb, Omio, Trainline

segments.content:
, and my audience actively saves travel, accommodation and planning content.

I'd love to create UGC for
that feels genuinely useful rather than like an ad.
1. "Things nobody tells you before booking [destination/trip type]" — naturally integrating

as the tool I use

My content performs best when it feels honest, useful and native to the platform — exactly what travel audiences trust. I produce and deliver raw + edited video files you can use across your channels.

Would you be open to a quick call or want me to send my rate card?

Content can be produced for organic posting, paid ads or whitelisting. Usage rights can be included depending on scope.

header.title: Calendar
header.lead: Week 1 focuses on regaining momentum with proven viral formats. Week 2 activates monetization channels. 5 posts per week, 2 rest days.

week1.title: Italian phrase series
week1.hook: "In Italy we say..." new version with a gesture, expression or daily-life moment

week1.title: Behind the scenes + Poll
week1.hook: "Which Italian expression should I explain next?" + question box

week1.title: Brazilian in Sicily POV
week1.hook: "Things that still confuse me in Italy" — relatable culture shock

week1.title: 5 things nobody tells you about Sicily
week1.hook: Saveable mini guide for travellers and future expats

week1.title: Sicily town POV
week1.hook: "A normal day here looks fake" — local-life travel Reel

week2.title: "In Brazil we say / in Italy we say"
Travel Q&A
week2.hook: "Ask me anything about Sicily" — collect FAQs for guides

week2.title: Italian market POV
week2.hook: "I went to the market and accidentally learned a new word" — cross-cultural humor

week2.title: Brand integration test
week2.hook: Product naturally integrated into a phrase-led or Sicily POV Reel

strategies.title: Phrase First
strategies.desc: Lead with the pattern people already recognize: "In Italy we say...", "In Brazil we say..." or "Nobody tells you this about Sicily...".

strategies.title: Repeatable Series
strategies.desc: Turn the strongest jokes and observations into recurring formats. The account grows when viewers know exactly what kind of cultural humor they will get next.

strategies.title: Natural Brand Fit
strategies.desc: Integrate brands into the same formats already working: language jokes, Sicily POVs, expat tools, local food moments and practical travel tips.

passwordGate.title: Restricted content
passwordGate.desc: Enter the password to access the calendar.
